summary: Justin teaches how to use Crexie.com to identify brokers and properties in target markets, then leverage on-market listings to build broker relationships and gain access to pre-market deals. The key strategy is contacting brokers about on-market properties that didn't sell pre-market, touring them to build rapport, and using that relationship to access the real deal flow.
takeaways: On-market deals (Crexie, LoopNet, CoStar) represent only 40% or less of available inventory; best deals sell pre-market to broker databases 2-3 weeks before listing sites
On-market deals that appear online 'didn't sell pre-market, so therefore the broker said okay, let's take and see what kind of chump we can get on the real market'
Filter Crexie by unit size and cap rate to narrow results in your target market
Click the OM (Offering Memo) button to access broker's marketing package with property details, photos, financials, unit mix, and pro forma
Call the broker: ask if property was in escrow, current offers, active offers, and tour availability; frame it as 'I'm super interested in this market in particular'
The entire purpose is building rapport: 'you are not going to get access to the real deals that make sense if you do not build rapport'
'Leverage the on to get to the off' - execute this with 3 properties in same market/submarket; expect most won't work but they give access to pre-market inventory where deals make financial sense

skill_candidates.change: Develop systematic broker relationship building process using on-market listings as entry point
skill_candidates.evidence: Justin demonstrates exact call script and property selection process: pick 3 on-market properties in target market, call brokers about escrow/offer status, schedule tours to build rapport, then leverage relationships for pre-market access

skill_candidates.change: Use OM documents from Crexie listings to populate deal analyzer with property financials and underwriting data
skill_candidates.evidence: 'This is a nice little PDF document that gives you the data that you need to input into your deal analyzer that we give you' - OM contains photos, financials, unit mix, current pro forma needed for underwriting

skill_candidates.change: Identify active brokers and deal flow in target market by analyzing on-market listings
skill_candidates.evidence: 'what you are using these websites for is to get access to find out who the heck are doing deals in your market' - filter by unit size to find broker names, then track which brokers have multiple listings

title: Lesson 1A: Crexi.com. Finding A Deal, Talking To Brokers. On To Off Method Explained
